hero.name: Aqeel
hero.description: Architecting the future with Autonomous Agents, Generative AI, and Scalable Web Architectures.

about.bio: I'm a dedicated Full-Stack AI Engineer passionate about bridging sophisticated AI models with user-centric web applications. My expertise spans autonomous multi-agent systems, real-time computer vision pipelines, and scalable backends using Django and DRF.
about.title: Full-Stack AI Engineer

projects.name: Object Detection
projects.description: Developed object detection systems using TensorFlow, OpenCV, YOLOv5, and Transformer-based models, optimized with RTX 3060 GPU.

implementations.name: Real-time Surveillance System
implementations.description: AI-powered security system with anomaly detection using TensorFlow and OpenCV

implementations.name: Retail Analytics
implementations.description: Customer behavior tracking using CV and object detection models

implementations.name: Smart Traffic Monitoring
implementations.description: Detecting traffic violations and vehicle count using YOLOv5 and OpenCV

implementations.name: Multi-Class Object Detector
implementations.description: Trained custom models for diverse objects using TensorFlow and PyTorch

projects.longDescription: Built production-grade object detection pipelines capable of identifying and localizing multiple classes in real time. Leveraged YOLOv5 and custom Transformer-based models trained on domain-specific datasets, achieving high mAP scores across surveillance, retail, and traffic use-cases. The system runs inference at 30+ FPS on an RTX 3060 GPU and includes a streaming API built with FastAPI.

projects.name: Image Classification
projects.description: Built classification models with CNNs and TensorFlow for real-world applications in healthcare, fashion, and agriculture.

implementations.name: Disease Detection in Plants
implementations.description: Classified plant leaf diseases using CNN achieving 94% accuracy

implementations.name: Fashion Item Classifier
implementations.description: Built model to identify clothing types from images for e-commerce

implementations.name: Dog Breed Classifier
implementations.description: Used TensorFlow and transfer learning (ResNet50) for breed prediction

projects.longDescription: Designed and trained deep convolutional neural networks for multi-class image classification. Applied transfer learning with ResNet50, MobileNetV2, and EfficientNet to maximize accuracy with limited data. Models are exported as TensorFlow SavedModel and served via a Streamlit interface.

projects.name: Face Detection
projects.description: Created real-time facial recognition and analysis tools using DeepFace and OpenCV.

implementations.name: Face Attendance System
implementations.description: Automated attendance using real-time face recognition with 99% precision

implementations.name: Face Analysis Dashboard
implementations.description: Demographics and emotion recognition via DeepFace analytics

implementations.name: Real-Time Face Tracking
implementations.description: Multi-face tracking at 25 FPS using OpenCV and MTCNN

projects.longDescription: Engineered end-to-end facial recognition systems using MTCNN for detection and DeepFace for verification and attribute analysis. The attendance system processes a live webcam feed and logs entries to a database in real time. The emotion analysis dashboard aggregates facial metrics into live charts.

projects.name: Agentic AI
projects.description: Built autonomous, collaborative agents using LangChain and CrewAI integrated with RAG architecture and memory.

implementations.name: Multi-Agent Chatbot
implementations.description: CrewAI-based agents that collaborate using shared memory and tools

implementations.name: Task-Specific AI Agents
implementations.description: Agents for PDF reading, web search, and structured response generation

projects.longDescription: Developed a multi-agent orchestration framework where specialized agents collaborate via CrewAI to complete complex tasks autonomously. Integrated Pinecone vector store for long-term RAG memory. The system supports tool use (web search, code execution, file I/O) and is deployed as a FastAPI microservice.

projects.name: Chatbot
projects.description: Designed custom AI-powered chatbots using LLMs and LangChain with tools and memory integration.

implementations.name: Conversational Assistant
implementations.description: Intelligent assistant with contextual memory using LLMs and LangChain

implementations.name: Multi-Functional Chatbot
implementations.description: Chatbot with PDF reader, web search, and summarizer tools integrated

projects.longDescription: Built a modular chatbot framework supporting multiple LLM backends with persistent conversation memory. The multi-tool chatbot exposes specialized agents for document Q&A, real-time web search, and text summarization. A Streamlit front-end provides an interactive UI.

projects.name: Math Solver
projects.description: Developed OCR-based AI tools to detect and solve handwritten math problems using CNNs and Streamlit.

implementations.name: AI Math Solver
implementations.description: Solves handwritten math problems using OCR and image recognition models

implementations.name: Equation Recognizer
implementations.description: Extracts and computes equations from scanned document images

projects.longDescription: Combined computer vision and OCR to build an end-to-end handwritten math problem solver. A custom CNN preprocesses the image, Tesseract OCR extracts the expression, and SymPy computes the solution. Accepts photo uploads or live webcam input.

projects.name: Full-Stack Development
projects.description: Experienced in building robust full-stack applications using React, Django, REST APIs, and Firebase.

implementations.name: Multi-Agent Website
implementations.description: Website integrating multi-agent AI tools with a DRF REST backend

implementations.name: Portfolio Website
implementations.description: This responsive portfolio built with React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS

projects.longDescription: Architect and deliver full-stack web applications from database schema to pixel-perfect UI. Backend services are built with Django REST Framework, secured with JWT auth, and deployed via Docker. Frontend apps use React + TypeScript with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.

projects.name: Frontend Development
projects.description: Created responsive and visually appealing UIs using React, Tailwind, and modern web design practices.

implementations.name: Responsive Portfolio
implementations.description: Modern portfolio using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS

implementations.name: Landing Pages
implementations.description: Multiple responsive marketing UIs for client projects

projects.longDescription: Specialise in building fast, accessible, and visually polished frontends. Every project follows accessibility best practices, is fully responsive, and achieves high Lighthouse scores. Animations implemented with Framer Motion.

projects.name: Backend Development
projects.description: Built secure and scalable backends using Django and DRF with token-based authentication and real-time Firebase integration.

implementations.name: Auth System
implementations.description: Custom login/signup with JWT and refresh token rotation using Django

implementations.name: API for AI Tools
implementations.description: RESTful APIs wrapping AI services, deployed with Docker and Nginx

projects.longDescription: Design and implement RESTful APIs that power web and mobile frontends. Authentication flows use JWT with refresh token rotation. APIs are documented with OpenAPI 3, containerised with Docker, and deployed behind Nginx.
